category_sources: source_facts.description says dungeon crawling video game; official SourceForge project category is Role-Playing Games and describes restoration of rogue and other roguelike games.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rogue; official project page identifies the restored game family as rogue/roguelike.
docs_sources: No dedicated official documentation page was found; source_facts.homepage and the official SourceForge project page are the best official project surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page exposes a CVS source-control tab for the Roguelike Restoration Project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a dungeon crawling video game; official SourceForge page lists Role-Playing Games, Curses/Ncurses UI, and C language.
